steps.t: As Lhan Tarren burns, the river still flows with quelling water astride the village. The flames are beginning to spread.... You should search the bank…
Another fire burns at the Elder's hut. The bucket can be found by the river that runs near the town. You should throw water on the fire at the flaming…
Another fire burns in the middle of Lhan Tarren. The bucket can be found by the river that runs near the town. You should throw water on the fire at t…
Another fire burns at the north-east corner of Lhan Tarren. The bucket can be found by the river that runs near the town. You should throw water on th…
Guto can be found in Lhan Tarren, mourning the loss of his grandfather the Elder. You should return to Guto in Lhan Tarren.
